Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Ark]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Engineer ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 34''' — Ark is a group that may be with the attackers.}}

== The Knight ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 8''' — Ark is a member of the team.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 8''' — Shadow Ark is a guest who cannot access most of his functions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 40''' — Raion went to see Ark.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 42''' — The narrator emerged from Ark.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 44''' — Ark is a location or entity that can be opened for docking.}}

== The Pilot ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 14''' — Ark communicates over speakers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 15''' — Ark is a location that starships were retreating back into.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 16''' — Ark is a vessel that can be taken anywhere by the Lichborn.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 18''' — Raion calls out to Ark to let them out.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 18''' — Ark instructs the preparation of a drone.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 23''' — Ark folded in on himself with a snort.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
